product_line: AI helps people generate. Digital Mycelium helps the artifact carry forward.

source_route_ref.privacy_note: Public packets should not expose private local paths, tokens, account data, secrets, or private user identifiers.

prompt_or_seed_ref.disclosure_note: Prompt, seed, or origin instruction may be embedded, referenced, or hash-only depending on privacy and review needs.

cohort_hash.canonicalization: sort artifact_manifest entries by path; include only entries where included_in_cohort_hash is true; for each entry use path|sha256|size_bytes; join lines with LF; compute sha256 over UTF-8 canonical_manifest_text

lineage.source_return_note: This bridge packet preserves route context so the carried artifact does not become an orphaned output.

boundary_declaration.summary: Bridge/export packet for source-return intake readiness only.
boundary_declaration.positive_claim: This packet preserves minimum source-return structure for later Digital Mycelium intake.

notes: This bridge receipt does not replace deterministic Digital Mycelium verification.
This packet is intended to arrive intake-ready.
The carried artifact remains inspectable in source/.
Final HELD settlement must be earned through the receiving intake route.

target_intake.compatible_route: v0.3 generalized intake / future bridge intake
target_intake.suggested_next_action: Run through Digital Mycelium intake and compare returned receipts against this bridge export packet.
